Pheebs: I lost a whole year! I can’t believe it! This is so unfair!
Speaker 2: Oh, I don’t know Pheebs. It’ll be okay.
Pheebs: Will it? Will it?! I mean, how would you feel if you found out you were 31?
Speaker 2: That’s not gonna happen. No. Because we have a new deal!
Pheebs: Plus, it totally ruined my schedule! I…I haven’t done any of the things I wanted to do by the time I was 31!
Speaker 2: Like what?
Pheebs: Like okay I-I-I, I haven’t met any Portuguese people! I, I haven’t had the perfect kiss! And I haven’t been to sniper’s school!
Speaker 3: Phoebe, y’know why don’t we just go upstairs and have some birthday cake?
Pheebs: No, I just feel like being by myself for a while. All right? I’ll see you guys later. Thanks.
